snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้

snippet.title: Pag ibig ay Kanibalismo II - fitterkarma (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Pag ibig ay Kanibalismo II - fitterkarma (Lyrics)

Lyrics :

[Verse 1]
Tayo'y mag momotor
Sa mga kalsada ng Siquijor
At magsigawan tayo
Na parang nasa horror
Tayo’y magkatay ng tao
Sabay isalang at i-adobo
Huwag ka lang magsabi ng totoo

[Chorus]
Ibabalik kita nang buong-buo
Pangako 'yun sa'yo
Sa’yo lang ang puso ko
Kahit kainin mo

[Verse 2]
Magdodroga tayo
Kimi lang, bawal 'yon (Kimi lang, bawal 'yon)
'Di ako masamang tao
Pumapatay lang ako
Ng kalungkutan ko
Pati ng sa'yo

[Chorus]
Ibabalik kita nang buong-buo
Pangako 'yun sa'yo
Sa'yo lang ang puso ko
Kahit kainin mo

[Bridge]
At hahalik ka nang may lipstick na dugo
Sa labi kong punong-puno ng panlasa ko sa’yo

[Outro]
Kanibalismo, ’di ka matiis
Kapag inalis mo, ika'y mamimiss
’Di nagmamalinis
O ika'y mamimiss
'Di ka matitiis
Tatlo na sais
Pag-ibig mong kay tamis

snippet.title: Love Like U - Ashtine Olviga (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
#AshtineOlviga #LoveLikeU #VivaRecords
Ashtine Olviga is back with a brand new single in “Love Like U.” This dreamy-infused track is produced and composed by the award-winning Thyro Alfaro that talks about a love that has been brewing for a long time as Ashtine sings “Nandiyan ka pala all this time / Won’t let you go (hey) / Now I’ve found a love like you.”

Composed by Thyro Alfaro
Published by Viva Music Publishing, Inc.
Produced by Thyro Alfaro
Arranged by Thyro Alfaro
A&R Manager Civ Fontanilla
A&R: Karl Art
Mixed by Thyro Alfaro
Mastered by Jan Fuertez
Recorded at Studio Z by Thyro Alfaro, Andrew Guevarra & Benjo Casaljay

Editor : Nicole Go

Bakit nga ba kung saan-saan tumitingin?
Ang daming oras kong isinayang
Ikaw lang naman palang kailangan
The way you love me like you do 
Has got me fallen deeper every day

🎙️ Lyrics: Journey - Don't Stop Believin'

[Verse 1]
Just a small-town girl, livin' in a lonely world
She took the midnight train goin' anywhere
Just a city boy, born and raised in South Detroit
He took the midnight train goin' anywhere

[Verse 2]
A singer in a smoky room
The smell of wine and cheap perfume
For a smile, they can share the night
It goes on and on and on and on

[Pre-Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Verse 3]
Workin' hard to get my fill
Everybody wants a thrill
Payin' anything to roll the dice
Just one more time

[Verse 4]
Some will win, some will lose
Some are born to sing the blues
Oh, the movie never ends
It goes on and on and on and on

[Pre-Chorus]
Strangers waitin'
Up and down the boulevard
Their shadows searchin' in the night
Streetlights, people
Livin' just to find emotion
Hidin' somewhere in the night

[Guitar Solo]

[Chorus]
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlights, people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on
Streetlights, people
Don't stop believin'
Hold on to that feelin'
Streetlights, people

.........

🎤 Lyrics: Ben&Ben - Lifetime (Reimagined) 

[Intro]
Was there a lifetime waiting for us
In a world where I was yours?

[Verse 1]
Paper planes and porcelain
Smell of rain through the window pane
And the sight of you
Oh, you were a good dream

[Verse 2]
I was scared to lose you then
But secrets turn into regrets
Buried feelings grow
Oh, you were a good dream

[Chorus]
Was there a lifetime waiting for us
In a world where I was yours?
Was it the wrong time, what if we tried
Giving in a little more?
To the warmth we had before

[Verse 3]
Tangled with another's eyes
Never mind, you were never mine
Glimpse of me and you
Oh, you were a good dream

[Pre-Chorus]
Smoke and ashes from these letters I'm burning
No fairytale ending if there was no beginning
Is it even worth it to reminisce?
How do you grieve for a love that did not even exist?

[Chorus]
Was there a lifetime waiting for us
In a world where I was yours?
Was it the wrong time, what if we tried
Giving in a little more?
To the warmth we had before

[Instrumental Break]

[Bridge]
Was it too bold of me to assume
You will catch me, was it just an illusion?
Say the word, I'll drive in reverse
I would spend a lifetime waiting for you
(Never mind, you were never mine)
Glimpse of me and you
Oh, you were a good dream

[Chorus]
Was there a lifetime waiting for us,
In a world where I was yours?,
Was it the wrong time what if we tried,
Giving in a little more?,
I'd spend a lifetime waiting in vain,
Just to go back to the way we were before
Was it the wrong time, what if we tried
Giving in a little more?
To the warmth we had before

[Outro]
Is there a lifetime waiting for us?
All this time, I have been yours

snippet.title: Forever
snippet.description:
#80sLoveSongs #RomanticBallads #AiLoveMusic

A deeply warm and emotional 80s soft pop rock ballad about a love that stands the test of time. When you find the one who makes your worries disappear, the only promise left to make is forever. A timeless melody of devotion, eternal love, and absolute peace of mind.

🎧 Listen to AiLove music on your favorite platforms:
🟢 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/artist/1ri1vFNfd33rRBaBFYw7vh
🔴 YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/channel/UCDcTrm-Hz_IwvfaC2S2PPkg
🍎 Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/artist/ailove/1832224455

Lyrics:

[Soft Piano Intro - Warm and Gentle]

[Verse 1]
I watch the sun begin to rise,
And see the morning in your eyes.
The hands of time are standing still,
As all my empty spaces fill.

[Pre-Chorus]
I never knew a love so deep,
A precious promise I will keep!

[Chorus]
Forever I will stay with you,
Because my love is deep and true.
Through every moment, night and day,
My love for you will always stay!
Forever.

[Main Melodic Guitar Hook - Warm Tone]

[Verse 2]
The seasons change and years go by,
But you are still my clear blue sky.
I feel so calm when you are near,
You make my worries disappear.

[Pre-Chorus]
I never knew a love so deep,
A precious promise I will keep!

[Chorus]
Forever I will stay with you,
Because my love is deep and true.
Through every moment, night and day,
My love for you will always stay!
Forever.

[Bridge]
The stars above may lose their light,
But we will always shine so bright.
My heart belongs to only you,
In every single thing I do!

[Instrumental Drop - Emotional Guitar Solo]

[Final Chorus]
Forever I will stay with you,
Because my love is deep and true.
Through every moment, night and day,
My love for you will always stay!
Forever.

[Outro]
Just you and me...
Forever true.
Forever.
[End]

#ForeverLove #SoftRockBallad #ClassicLoveSongs #EternalLove #ComfortingMusic #EvergreenHits #NostalgiaMusic #80sMusic
